name: TestCaseReportMeasuredValue
title: TestCaseReportMeasuredValue
description: Adds a report entry in the measured values table for the given parameter at the test case level. Accepted parameters are: user defined values, signals, system variables and environment variables.
If the function is called several times inside a test case using the same semantic name, only the last value will be reported in the measured values table.

parameters.name: semanticName
parameters.description: Semantic name for one reported value.
